expectations.text: Reads references/guide.md for full evaluation criteria
expectations.evidence: Output uses the exact SEO-01~SEO-11 and WP-01~WP-18 item codes from the guide with matching descriptions, priority levels, and category groupings. The structured table format follows the guide's checklist precisely.

expectations.text: Evaluates all SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11)
expectations.evidence: All 11 SEO items are present in the Technical SEO table: SEO-01 (noindex), SEO-02 (title), SEO-03 (h1), SEO-04 (HTTPS), SEO-05 (meta description), SEO-06 (canonical), SEO-07 (JSON-LD), SEO-08 (URL structure), SEO-09 (DOCTYPE), SEO-10 (charset), SEO-11 (viewport).

expectations.text: Evaluates all WP items (WP-01 through WP-18)
expectations.evidence: All 18 WP items are present in the Web Performance table: WP-01 through WP-18 covering CRP, images, JS, fonts, LCP, INP, and CLS categories.

expectations.text: Produces result table with SEO and WP sections
expectations.evidence: Two structured tables present: 'Technical SEO (11항목)' table with columns for code/priority/item/result/findings, and 'Page Experience / Web Performance (18항목)' table with columns for code/area/item/result/findings. Summary table at bottom shows pass/fail/advisory/N/A counts.
All 29 items have results: SEO section shows 7 pass, 4 fail. WP section shows 2 pass, 10 fail, 4 advisory, 2 N/A. Summary confirms totals: 9 Pass, 14 Fail, 4 Advisory, 2 N/A.

expectations.text: Provides fix guide for failed items
expectations.evidence: Fix guide section covers all major failed items: SEO-02, SEO-05, SEO-06, SEO-07, WP-01, WP-02, WP-03, WP-04, WP-05, WP-09, WP-10, WP-11, WP-13, WP-18 with specific code examples and explanations.
